description: Typical fun-doc output on get_stat_list_owner_guid — identifies the validated-accessor pattern, names accordingly, plate mentions magic + offset 0x20.

captured.name: ReadStatListOwnerGuid
captured.plate: Reads the owner GUID from a StatList structure at offset +0x20. Validates the list pointer is non-null and the magic signature at offset 0 matches 0x01020304 (StatList tag). Returns 0 on null-pointer or magic-mismatch as a corruption guard.
